# Q9 brute-force flag via if() (failed logon bruteforce)

**Dataset**: `gx_05_auth` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

Failed-logon brute-force detection — count failures per source/account. Q9 brute-force flag via if(). `count_distinct()` is the distinct-count (never `dcount`); `if(c, a, b)` classifies inline (nest for multi-branch; `case` does not exist).

```sql
dataset = gx_05_auth | filter outcome = "failure" | comp count() as failures, count_distinct(host) as hosts_hit by user | alter verdict = if(failures >= 5, "BRUTE_FORCE", failures >= 3, "SUSPECT", "normal") | sort desc failures
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 5). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
